privileged_info_summary: The task operates on synthetic Redmine data. The target issue has the exact subject 'Migrate CI/CD from Jenkins to GitHub Actions' within the 'infra-devops' project. The user is instructed to add the exact comment 'Phase 2 migration complete: build and packaging jobs now running on GitHub Actions. Average build time improved from 18 minutes to 9 minutes. All artifact uploads verified. Proceeding to Phase 3 (deployment jobs) next sprint.'. Both metadata claims are accurate and confirmed.
